SEARCH
Package com.example.myapplication

Class EventStoreTest

java.lang.Object
com.example.myapplication.EventStoreTest
public class EventStoreTest extends Object
Integration tests for EventStore that write real data to Firestore and clean up after. These tests require a real device or emulator with internet access. Place in: app/src/androidTest/java/com/example/myapplication/ The following test file was written with the guidance of Claude AI Prompt: "Guide me with writing tests for EventStore" March 13, 2026

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    setUp()
     
    void
    tearDown()
    Cleans up the test event from Firestore after each test.
    void
    testAddEvent_geolocationRequired_true()
    Test that addEvent saves geolocationRequired as true when set.
    void
    testAddEvent_savesToFirestore()
    Test that addEvent saves the event to Firestore and it can be retrieved.
    void
    testDelEventById_removesFromFirestore()
    Test that delEventById removes the event from Firestore.
    void
    testGetEventById_returnsCorrectEvent()
    Test that getEventById retrieves the correct event from Firestore.

  • Method Details

    • setUp

      public void setUp()

    • tearDown

      public void tearDown() throws InterruptedException
      Cleans up the test event from Firestore after each test. This ensures no leftover data remains after tests run.
      Throws:
      InterruptedException

    • testAddEvent_savesToFirestore

      public void testAddEvent_savesToFirestore() throws InterruptedException
      Test that addEvent saves the event to Firestore and it can be retrieved.
      Throws:
      InterruptedException

    • testAddEvent_geolocationRequired_true

      public void testAddEvent_geolocationRequired_true() throws InterruptedException
      Test that addEvent saves geolocationRequired as true when set.
      Throws:
      InterruptedException

    • testDelEventById_removesFromFirestore

      public void testDelEventById_removesFromFirestore() throws InterruptedException
      Test that delEventById removes the event from Firestore.
      Throws:
      InterruptedException

    • testGetEventById_returnsCorrectEvent

      public void testGetEventById_returnsCorrectEvent() throws InterruptedException
      Test that getEventById retrieves the correct event from Firestore.
      Throws:
      InterruptedException
